sections.paragraph:
Original: לשׁע

Transliteration: lesha‛

Phonetic: leh'-shah

BDB Definition:

Lasha = "fissure"
  1. a place in the southeast of Palestine at the limit of the Canaanites territory, near Sodom and Gomorrah

Origin: from an unused root thought to mean to break through

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
